name: claude-mobile-companion
description: Interact with Claude Code CLI from your mobile

scripts.serve: concurrently -n server,ngrok -c blue,green "npm run start:server" "npm run start:tunnel"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,mobile -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=mobile
